question: Is the red car on the left or right side of the police car?
gold_answer: The red car is on the left side of the police car.
raw_answer: B. The red car is on the right side of the police car.
memory_answer: A. The red car is on the left side of the police car.
small_answer: B. The red car is on the right side of the police car.
base_small_answer: B. The red car is on the right side of the police car.
